creator: gnb@itga.com.au
text:
FWIW, I'm running a PPTP VPN with mpd-3.2 with an almost-identical config.  I 
have experienced no kernel problems (currently running a 4.3-BETA from around 
Mar 20).  I am using modules only for MPD, no compiled-in stuff.

[see http://www.itga.com.au/~gnb/vpn/ for some incomplete dox on my setup]

Greg.
